title.uz:
Sun'iy Intellekt Orqali
Real Biznes Yechimlari
title.en:
Building Real Solutions
With Artificial Intelligence

description.uz: Men AI tizimlari, Telegram botlar, avtomatlashtirish platformalari va premium AI kontentlar ishlab chiqishga ixtisoslashganman. Mening maqsadim — g'oyalarni real ishlaydigan raqamli mahsulotlarga aylantirish.
description.en: I specialize in AI systems, Telegram bots, automation platforms and premium AI content creation. My goal is to transform ideas into working digital products that solve real business problems.

subtitle.uz: Sun'iy intellekt, avtomatlashtirish va premium raqamli mahsulotlar yaratishga ixtisoslashganman.
subtitle.en: Specialized in artificial intelligence, automation and creating premium digital products.

card_desc1.uz: Men oddiy g'oyalarni real foydalaniladigan AI tizimlari, Telegram botlar va biznes avtomatlashtirish platformalariga aylantiraman.
card_desc1.en: I transform simple ideas into real AI systems, Telegram bots and business automation platforms.

card_desc2.uz: Asosiy maqsadim — sun'iy intellekt yordamida odamlar va bizneslar uchun vaqt tejaydigan tizimlar yaratish.
card_desc2.en: My main goal is to create time-saving systems for people and businesses using artificial intelligence.

role1_desc.uz: AI bo'limini boshqarish, AI strategiyalar ishlab chiqish va avtomatlashtirish tizimlarini joriy etish.
role1_desc.en: Managing AI department, developing AI strategies and implementing automation systems.

role2_desc.uz: AI yordamida video, poster, reklama roliklari, viral kontentlar va marketing materiallari yaratish.
role2_desc.en: Creating videos, posters, ads, viral content and marketing materials using AI.

role3_desc.uz: Telegram botlar, CRM integratsiyalar, avtomatik javob tizimlari va biznes jarayonlarini raqamlashtirish.
role3_desc.en: Telegram bots, CRM integrations, auto-reply systems and digitizing business processes.

role4_desc.uz: AI yordamchilar, ta'lim botlari, qurilish tahlil tizimlari va premium SaaS g'oyalari.
role4_desc.en: AI assistants, education bots, construction analysis systems and premium SaaS ideas.

subtitle.uz: Real ishlaydigan AI tizimlar, avtomatlashtirish platformalari va premium raqamli mahsulotlar.
subtitle.en: Real working AI systems, automation platforms and premium digital products.

project1_desc.uz: Marketing, tarjima, kontent ishlab chiqish, AI chat va biznes yordamchi funksiyalarini birlashtirgan tizim.
project1_desc.en: A system combining marketing, translation, content creation, AI chat and business assistant functions.

project2_desc.uz: O'quvchilar va talabalar uchun yaratilgan aqlli ta'lim yordamchisi.
project2_desc.en: An intelligent education assistant created for students and learners.

project3_desc.uz: Qurilish va interyer sohasiga mo'ljallangan AI tahlil tizimi.
project3_desc.en: An AI analysis system designed for construction and interior design.

project4_desc.uz: Premium kontent ishlab chiqarish va marketing strategiyalari tizimi.
project4_desc.en: Premium content creation and marketing strategy system.

subtitle.uz: Eng zamonaviy va kuchli texnologiyalar bilan ishlayman.
subtitle.en: Working with the most modern and powerful technologies.
